per_eval_results.notes: Full mode target: 60-75% reduction. Achieved 26.7% word reduction. Focus on removing filler while preserving readability. Below target but maintains technical accuracy and natural flow.
Lite mode target: 30-40% reduction. ACHIEVED: 35.2% word reduction, exactly in target range. Natural readability preserved, no telegraphic feel.
Ultra mode target: 75-85% reduction. Achieved 57% word reduction. Dense, telegraphic format. Critical meaning preserved, slight token overhead from test size.

strengths: Lite mode (eval 2) hits target perfectly: 35.2% reduction in 30-40% range with natural readability maintained
Ultra mode (eval 3) achieves 57% reduction, densest format yet comprehensible. Abbreviations and telegraphic style working well
All assertions passed across all evals. No loss of critical technical meaning
Code blocks perfectly preserved in all evaluations
Lite mode slightly faster than baseline (13.7s vs 22.3s)
areas_for_improvement: Full mode (eval 1) underperforms target: 26.7% reduction vs 60-75% goal. Trade-off between readability and compression needs adjustment
Ultra mode has token overhead (11.8%) vs baseline. Investigate if compression algorithm is adding markers or formatting overhead
Full mode rules may be too conservative. Consider more aggressive article/weak-verb elimination
Consider context-aware compression: preserve articles in code comments, remove more aggressively in prose
next_iteration_recommendations: Increase full mode aggressiveness: test removing more weak verbs, more softeners, more filler phrases
Investigate token overhead in ultra mode: could be compression markers or test-specific formatting
Lite mode is production-ready. Ultra mode ready with minor tweaks. Full mode needs iteration
Consider test with actual API/framework generation (not just manual simulation) for real-world validation
Test on varied domains (code review, documentation, tutoring) to ensure compression generalizes

verdict.overall_recommendation: Iterate on full mode, lock lite and ultra modes. Lite mode shows perfect balance of compression and readability.
